---
title: "Daiyu Guan"
image: images/daiyu_guan.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: gdy6666662021@163.com
      href: mailto:gdy6666662021@163.com
    - icon: solid user
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/  
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am an undergraduate student at Ocean University of China, majoring in Accounting (ACCA Direction) at the College of Management. My research interests lie in corporate governance, state-owned enterprise (SOE) reform, and ESG performance. I am currently a part-time research fellow at the Institute of Applied Accounting, Ocean University of China, focusing on strategic alliance networks and their impact on corporate behavior.

My work employs empirical methods to examine how institutional arrangements—such as property rights reform and strategic alliances—shape firm outcomes including innovation, investment efficiency, and sustainability practices.

## Education

- **B.A. in Accounting (ACCA Direction)** | Ocean University of China, College of Management  
  September 2023 – June 2027 (Expected)  
  GRE: V 162 / Q 170 / AW 3.5

## Skills

- **Stata**: Proficient in data cleaning, regression analysis, and various robustness checks including PSM, event study, placebo tests, and instrumental variable estimation. Capable of independently completing all empirical components of CSSCI-standard research papers.
- **OpenCode**: Skilled in batch web scraping, downloading and processing unstructured data and academic literature with high efficiency.
- **Guitar**

## Research Experience

- **Part-time Research Fellow**, Institute of Applied Accounting, Ocean University of China  
  March 2023 – Present  
  Participated in research projects including the National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) Young Scientists Fund, focusing on strategic alliance announcement data collection, classification, and empirical analysis.

## Honors & Awards

- National Scholarship, Ministry of Education, 2024
- First Prize Scholarship, Ocean University of China, 2024

:::
